compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing tests for preconditions-record.sh CLI wrapper
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Write failing behavioral tests for the preconditions-record.sh CLI wrapper before it exists.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test: invocation with required args (ticket_id, gate_name, session_id, tier) writes a PRECONDITIONS.json event file into the per-ticket event directory
- [ ] Test: missing required args exits non-zero with usage message
- [ ] Test: output JSON contains fields: event_type, gate_name, session_id, worktree_id, tier, timestamp, data
- [ ] Test: two invocations with same gate_name+session_id produce two separate timestamped files (LWW handled at read time)
- [ ] File: tests/scripts/test-preconditions-record.sh (must NOT yet exist at time of writing; tests must fail RED)
- [ ] .test-index entry added: plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-record.sh -> tests/scripts/test-preconditions-record.sh

## Files to Modify
- CREATE: tests/scripts/test-preconditions-record.sh
- MODIFY: .test-index (add mapping)

## Testing Mode
RED — tests must fail before T4 implements the target script

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6 ✓ RED tests written in tests/scripts/test-preconditions-record.sh — all failing as expected
comments.author: Test
